form.layout: ==========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[单号] orgId[业务组织] carrierId[承运商ID] carrierConfigId[承运商配置ID] relatedBillType[关联单据类型] relatedBillCode[关联单据号] shipmentDate[发运日期] businessDate[业务日期] status[状态] ==========>freight[承运信息]====== trackingNo[运单号] labelUrl[面单URL] freightAmount[运费] freightCurrencyId[运费币种] freightTerms[运费条款] freightSettlementStatus[运费结算状态] totalWeight[总重量(kg)] totalVolume[总体积(m³)] totalParcels[总包裹数] ==========>receiver[收货信息]====== receiverName[收货人] receiverPhone[收货人电话] receiverAddress[收货地址] receiverCountry[国家] receiverProvince[省份] receiverCity[城市] receiverDistrict[区县] ==========^sender[发货信息]========= senderName[发货人] senderPhone[发货人电话] senderAddress[发货地址] shipperId[发货员(职员)] ==========^delivery[送达信息]========= estimatedDeliveryDate[预计送达日期] actualDeliveryDate[实际送达日期] signedBy[签收人] ==========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

==========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[单号] orgId[业务组织] carrierId[承运商ID] carrierConfigId[承运商配置ID] relatedBillType[关联单据类型] relatedBillCode[关联单据号] shipmentDate[发运日期] businessDate[业务日期] status[状态] ==========>freight[承运信息]====== trackingNo[运单号] labelUrl[面单URL] freightAmount[运费] freightCurrencyId[运费币种] freightTerms[运费条款] freightSettlementStatus[运费结算状态] totalWeight[总重量(kg)] totalVolume[总体积(m³)] totalParcels[总包裹数] ==========>receiver[收货信息]====== receiverName[收货人] receiverPhone[收货人电话] receiverAddress[收货地址] receiverCountry[国家] receiverProvince[省份] receiverCity[城市] receiverDistrict[区县] ==========>sender[发货信息]====== senderName[发货人] senderPhone[发货人电话] senderAddress[发货地址] shipperId[发货员(职员)] ==========>delivery[送达信息]====== estimatedDeliveryDate[预计送达日期] actualDeliveryDate[实际送达日期] signedBy[签收人] remark[备注](2)

form.title: 查询条件
form.layout: code[单号] status[状态] carrierId[承运商ID] shipmentDate[发运日期]
